prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "3. Legal Proceedings" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 4. Mine Safety Disclosures".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 3's text:
- If the "Item 4" heading is visible on this page, Item 3 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 3 runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 3 at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
False Claims Act Litigation: United States of America ex rel. James Marcilla and Isela Chavez, USDC, Dist. of N.M., 8/23/19, transferred to USDC Dist. of DE 7/25/24.

ASDA Equal Value Claim: Ms S Brierley & Others v. ASDA Stores Ltd (2406372/2008 & Others – Manchester Employment Tribunal); Abbas & Others v Asda Stores limited (KB-2022-003243); and Abusubih & Others v Asda Stores limited (KB-2022-003240).

Federal Trade Commission and State Attorneys General Driver Platform Litigation: Federal Trade Commission, et al. v. Walmart Inc., USDC, N.D. Cal., 2/26/26.

Mexico Antitrust Matter: Comisión Federal de Competencia Económica de México, Investigative Authority v. Nueva Wal-Mart de México, S.de R.L. de C.V. (Docket IO-002-2020, consolidated with Docket DE-026-2020), Mexico, 10/6/23.

India Antitrust Matter: Competition Commission of India, Case No. 40 of 2019, order initiating investigation 1/13/20.
